title: How Massive Can a Population III Starburst Be? Simulating the First Galaxies with High Lyman-Werner Background
summary: Observing the first generation of Population~III (Pop~III) stars is one of the most demanding challenges in astronomy. Indeed, Pop~III stars are expected to predominantly form within faint minihalos at early times with a top-heavy initial mass function, resulting in efficient metal enrichment and a fast transition to Pop II-dominated systems. However, recent surveys with the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) have identified galaxies at the end of the Epoch of Reionization (EoR) with possible signatures of significant Pop~III star formation even at these later times. We here explore the physical conditions required to produce massive Pop~III starbursts during the EoR, using cosmological radiation-hydrodynamic zoom-in simulations. We specifically focus on galaxies with a virial (dynamical) mass of $M_{\rm vir} \approx 10^{8} \msun $ at $7 \lesssim z \lesssim 8$, i.e., the atomic-cooling halos that could be potential sites for such maximal Pop~III starbursts. In particular, we vary the strength of Lyman-Werner (LW) background radiation up to $J_{\rm LW} \leq 10^4J_{21}$, further imposing a high star formation efficiency (up to $ε_{\rm ff} = 1.0$). Our results show that Pop~III starbursts, observable in strongly-lensed survey fields like GLIMPSE, can occur in the presence of a sufficiently high LW flux (with $\gtrsim 10^3J_{21}$), leading to delayed, but intense Pop~III star formation. However, even for such high LW fluxes, the Pop~III starburst mass is limited to $M_{\star, \rm Pop~III} <10^6\msun$, as strong internal metal enrichment occurs after the first Pop~III supernova explosions within the simulated galaxies. While the conditions favoring observable Pop~III starbursts are expected to be rare, we anticipate that future and ongoing large-volume surveys leveraging gravitational lensing, such as VENUS, will detect multiple cases of Pop~III starbursts in the EoR.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现再电离时期晚期可能存在大量第三星族恒星形成，研究通过宇宙学辐射流体动力学模拟探索在再电离时期产生大规模第三星族星暴所需的物理条件。
AI.motivation: 观测第一代第三星族恒星是天文学中最具挑战性的任务之一。虽然第三星族恒星预期主要在早期形成于微弱迷你晕中，但JWST最近的观测发现再电离时期晚期星系中可能存在显著的第三星族恒星形成迹象，这促使研究者探索在再电离时期产生大规模第三星族星暴的物理条件。
AI.method: 使用宇宙学辐射流体动力学放大模拟，聚焦于再电离时期（z≈7-8）的原子冷却晕（M_vir≈10^8 M_sun），通过改变莱曼-维尔纳背景辐射强度（J_LW≤10^4 J_21）并设置高恒星形成效率（ε_ff=1.0），研究第三星族星暴的形成条件。
AI.result: 模拟结果显示，在足够高的莱曼-维尔纳辐射通量（≥10^3 J_21）下，可以发生延迟但强烈的第三星族恒星形成，产生可观测的第三星族星暴。然而，即使在高辐射通量下，第三星族星暴质量也限制在M_*,PopIII<10^6 M_sun，因为模拟星系内第一代第三星族超新星爆发后会发生强烈的内部金属增丰。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 观测第一代第三星族（Pop~III）恒星是天文学中最具挑战性的任务之一。实际上，Pop~III恒星预计主要形成于早期微弱的暗物质晕中，具有顶部重的初始质量函数，导致高效的金属增丰和快速向以Pop~II为主的系统转变。然而，詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）的最新巡天观测在再电离纪元（EoR）末期识别出一些星系，即使在较晚时期也可能存在显著的Pop~III恒星形成特征。我们在此利用宇宙学辐射流体动力学zoom-in模拟，探索在再电离纪元期间产生大规模Pop~III星暴所需的物理条件。我们特别关注维里（动力学）质量约为$M_{\rm vir} \approx 10^{8} \msun $、红移$7 \lesssim z \lesssim 8$的星系，即可能成为此类最大Pop~III星暴潜在场所的原子冷却晕。我们特别改变了莱曼-沃纳（LW）背景辐射的强度，最高达$J_{\rm LW} \leq 10^4J_{21}$，并进一步施加了高恒星形成效率（最高达$ε_{\rm ff} = 1.0$）。我们的结果表明，在足够高的LW通量（$\gtrsim 10^3J_{21}$）存在的情况下，Pop~III星暴（可在如GLIMPSE等强引力透镜巡天区域中观测到）可能发生，导致延迟但强烈的Pop~III恒星形成。然而，即使在这样的高LW通量下，Pop~III星暴质量仍被限制在$M_{\star, \rm Pop~III} <10^6\msun$，因为在模拟星系内，第一次Pop~III超新星爆发后会发生强烈的内部金属增丰。虽然有利于可观测Pop~III星暴的条件预计较为罕见，但我们预期未来和正在进行的利用引力透镜效应的大规模巡天项目（如VENUS）将在再电离时期探测到多个Pop~III星暴案例。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：有利于可观测第三星族星暴的条件预计较为罕见，但未来利用引力透镜效应的大规模巡天项目（如VENUS）有望在再电离时期探测到多个第三星族星暴案例。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of simulation parameters. Column (1): Name of run. Column (2): Strength of LW background in units of \(10^{-21}\,erg\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,Hz^{-1}\,sr^{-1}\) . Column (3): Star formation efficiency \(\epsilon_{ff}\) . Column (4): Halo virial mass at onset of star formation. Column (5): Assigned group based on the strength of \(\bar{J}_{21,0}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：模拟参数总结。第(1)列：运行名称。第(2)列：LW背景强度，单位为\(10^{-21}\,erg\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,Hz^{-1}\,sr^{-1}\)。第(3)列：恒星形成效率\(\epsilon_{ff}\)。第(4)列：恒星形成开始时的暗物质晕维里质量。第(5)列：基于\(\bar{J}_{21,0}\)强度分配的组别。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Mass evolution within our simulated galaxies. The left panel showcases the evolution of virial mass ( \(M_{{vir}}\) , dashed), gas mass ( \(M_{{gas}}\) , dotted), and stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) , solid) within the virial radius of the target halo as a function of time (or redshift), with the thick gray line indicating the threshold virial mass for an atomic-cooling halo ( \(M_{{ACH}}\) ; Prole et al. 2024 ) as a reference. The right panel further shows the evolution of the stellar mass within the target halo, separating the total stellar mass (dashed) from its Pop III contribution (solid). Different simulation runs are shown in different colors, with increasing line widths indicating increasing values of the strength of the LW flux ( \(\bar{J}_{21,0}\) ) in different simulation groups ( NoLW , Low , Intermediate , High ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们模拟星系内的质量演化。左图展示了目标暗物质晕维里半径内维里质量（\(M_{{vir}}\)，虚线）、气体质量（\(M_{{gas}}\)，点线）和恒星质量（\(M_{\star}\)，实线）随时间（或红移）的演化，粗灰线表示原子冷却暗物质晕的维里质量阈值（\(M_{{ACH}}\)；Prole et al. 2024）作为参考。右图进一步展示了目标暗物质晕内恒星质量的演化，区分了总恒星质量（虚线）及其Pop III贡献（实线）。不同模拟运行以不同颜色显示，线宽增加表示不同模拟组（NoLW、Low、Intermediate、High）中LW通量强度（\(\bar{J}_{21,0}\)）的增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spatially resolved properties of the simulated galaxy from the LW1e3E100 run at \(z\approx 7.67\) (top row), when the first star formation occurred, and \(z\approx 7.59\) (bottom row), capturing the immediate post-starburst moment. From left to right, the panels show DM density, hydrogen number density, gas temperature, and gas metallicity along the same line of sight within \(8R_{vir}\) from the center of the galaxy. For reference, we indicate a length scale of 10 kpc at the top of each panel, and also delineate the halo virial radius (dashed circles). After the initial starburst, SN feedback from Pop III stars (cyan X-symbols) has destroyed the dense gas structure at the center. The strong outflows driven by intense SN feedback consequently expel most of the Pop II stars (magenta triangles) and gas clouds; the SN feedback also rapidly heats up and enriches nearby gas clouds.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自LW1e3E100运行的模拟星系在\(z\approx 7.67\)（上行，首次恒星形成发生时）和\(z\approx 7.59\)（下行，星暴后瞬间）的空间分辨性质。从左到右，面板显示了沿同一视线方向、距星系中心\(8R_{vir}\)范围内的暗物质密度、氢数密度、气体温度和气体金属丰度。作为参考，我们在每个面板顶部标出了10 kpc的长度尺度，并描绘了暗物质晕维里半径（虚线圆圈）。初始星暴后，来自Pop III恒星（青色X符号）的超新星反馈已摧毁了中心致密气体结构。由强烈超新星反馈驱动的强外流因此驱逐了大部分Pop II恒星（洋红色三角形）和气体云；超新星反馈也迅速加热并增丰了附近的气体云。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Gas properties of the target galaxy for the LW1e3E100 run before the starburst (left), mid-starburst (middle), and after the first SNe have exploded (right). Before the initial starburst, the \(T-n\) phase diagram bifurcates at high densities ( \(n_{H}\gtrsim 10\,cm^{-3}\) ) into a hot track ( \(T_{gas}\gtrsim 10^{4}K\) ), which is fully exposed to strong LW flux, and a cold one ( \(T_{gas}<10^{4}K\) ), where the gas is self-shielded by \(H_{2}\) . When gas particles reach \(n_{H}\gtrsim 5\times 10^{2}\,cm^{-3}\) , a small abundance of \(H_{2}\) molecules can trigger the \(H_{2}\) self-shielding effect, consequently cooling down a fraction of the dense gas. Eventually, intense SN feedback from the starburst has heated nearby gas to \(T_{gas}\lesssim 10^{8}~K\) , thus destroying the central dense gas structure. Most of the dense gas is expelled through outflows, while second-generation stars are still forming inside the remaining dense gas.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LW1e3E100运行中目标星系在星暴前（左）、星暴中（中）和首次超新星爆发后（右）的气体性质。初始星暴前，\(T-n\)相图在高密度（\(n_{H}\gtrsim 10\,cm^{-3}\)）处分叉为一条热轨迹（\(T_{gas}\gtrsim 10^{4}K\)，完全暴露于强LW通量）和一条冷轨迹（\(T_{gas}<10^{4}K\)，气体被\(H_{2}\)自屏蔽）。当气体粒子达到\(n_{H}\gtrsim 5\times 10^{2}\,cm^{-3}\)时，少量\(H_{2}\)分子可触发\(H_{2}\)自屏蔽效应，从而冷却一部分致密气体。最终，来自星暴的强烈超新星反馈将附近气体加热至\(T_{gas}\lesssim 10^{8}~K\)，从而摧毁了中心致密气体结构。大部分致密气体通过外流被驱逐，而第二代恒星仍在剩余致密气体内部形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Illustrating the modeling of external metal pollution. Here, we show the Lagrangian region of high-resolution particles, containing the target halo for Pop III star formation at its center (sky blue circle). The star symbols represent star particles external to the target halo (out-stars), which are the sources of the external metal enrichment. We mark the extent of the metal bubble (black dashed line), reached at \(\Delta t\) after the start of the enrichment process. The red arrow ( \(d_{out-tgt}\) ) shows the distance between the out-stars host halo and the center of the target halo. The cone (yellow dashed line) indicates the solid angle ( \(\Omega\) ) considered for tracking the metal bubble front, covering an area of \(2R_{vir}\) at the distance \(d_{out-tgt}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：说明外部金属污染的建模。这里，我们展示了高分辨率粒子的拉格朗日区域，其中包含中心用于Pop III恒星形成的目标暗物质晕（天蓝色圆圈）。星形符号代表目标暗物质晕外部的恒星粒子（外部恒星），它们是外部金属增丰的来源。我们标出了金属气泡的范围（黑色虚线），该范围在增丰过程开始后经过\(\Delta t\)达到。红色箭头（\(d_{out-tgt}\)）显示了外部恒星宿主暗物质晕与目标暗物质晕中心之间的距离。锥体（黄色虚线）表示用于追踪金属气泡前沿的立体角（\(\Omega\)），在距离\(d_{out-tgt}\)处覆盖面积为\(2R_{vir}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Distance from the out-stars host halo to the metal bubble front as a function of time, followed until internal enrichment is triggered within our simulated galaxy in order to constrain the external metal enrichment process. Each solid colored line shows the evolution of the bubble front for select metallicities: \(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-6\) (orange), \(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-5\) (blue), and \(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-4\) (black). The dashed lines show the distance to the center of the target halo (black) and to its outer boundary (red). For comparison, we show the analytic result using the galactic outflow model of Dijkstra et al. ( 2014 , dotted magenta line) . We also indicate the time when the Pop III starburst occurs within our simulated galaxy (marked as a green shaded region), demonstrating that metal bubbles from nearby enrichment events cannot reach the target halo on time to prevent metal-free star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：外部恒星宿主暗物质晕到金属气泡前沿的距离随时间的变化，追踪至我们模拟星系内触发内部增丰，以约束外部金属增丰过程。每条实线颜色显示了选定金属丰度下气泡前沿的演化：\(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-6\)（橙色）、\(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-5\)（蓝色）和\(\log(Z_{gas}/~Z_{\odot})>-4\)（黑色）。虚线显示了到目标暗物质晕中心（黑色）及其外边界（红色）的距离。作为比较，我们展示了使用Dijkstra et al.（2014，品红色点线）星系外流模型的解析结果。我们还标出了模拟星系内Pop III星暴发生的时间（标记为绿色阴影区域），表明来自附近增丰事件的金属气泡无法及时到达目标暗物质晕以阻止无金属恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Evolution of the gas-phase metallicity within the virial radius of our simulated galaxies as a function of time and redshift. The dashed lines show the gas-phase metallicity contributed by the total amount of metals produced from both Pop III and Pop II stars, while the solid lines show the metallicity with the metals produced by Pop III stars only. We employ the same convention for the lines as in Fig. 1 , and the gray shaded region indicates the range of threshold metallicities, from \(\log Z_{thr}=-5.5\) to \(-3.5\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：模拟星系维里半径内气相金属丰度随时间（红移）的演化。虚线显示了由Pop III和Pop II恒星产生的总金属量贡献的气相金属丰度，而实线显示了仅由Pop III恒星产生的金属丰度。我们采用与图1相同的线条约定，灰色阴影区域表示阈值金属丰度范围，从\(\log Z_{thr}=-5.5\)到\(-3.5\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The post-processed SEDs and expected AB magnitudes for select JWST filters, based on our simulated galaxies during a starburst. The left panels correspond to the LW1e3E100 run, and the right panels to the LW1e4E100 run. While the top row shows the stellar mass evolution, marking three illustrative phases with colored square symbols, panels in the middle row show AB magnitudes calculated for select JWST NIRCam filters (square symbols) at the observed frame, including wide and medium band ones. The magenta x-shaped symbols with error bars represent the limiting magnitude of the JADES Deep survey ( Eisenstein et al., 2023 ), together with their respective bandwidth, and the dashed cyan lines show the limiting magnitude of the GLIMPSE survey ( Atek et al., 2025 ). We also indicate effective limiting magnitudes for the GLIMPSE survey, assuming gravitational lensing magnifications of \(\mu=3\) (green dashed line) and \(\mu=10\) (orange dashed line). Panels in the bottom row show rest-frame SEDs, in units of nJy, for three characteristic phases: the initial Pop III starburst (black), the end of this phase before transition into Pop II star formation (blue), and the second starburst phase consisting of Pop II stars (red).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：基于星暴期间模拟星系的后处理光谱能量分布（SED）和选定JWST滤光片的预期AB星等。左图对应LW1e3E100运行，右图对应LW1e4E100运行。上行显示恒星质量演化，用彩色方形符号标记三个代表性阶段；中行显示在观测坐标系下，为选定的JWST NIRCam滤光片（方形符号）计算的AB星等，包括宽带和中等带宽滤光片。带有误差棒的洋红色x形符号表示JADES Deep巡天（Eisenstein et al., 2023）的极限星等及其相应带宽，青色虚线表示GLIMPSE巡天（Atek et al., 2025）的极限星等。我们还标出了GLIMPSE巡天的有效极限星等，假设引力透镜放大倍数为\(\mu=3\)（绿色虚线）和\(\mu=10\)（橙色虚线）。下行显示了三个特征阶段在静止坐标系下的SED，单位为nJy：初始Pop III星暴（黑色）、该阶段结束向Pop II恒星形成转变前（蓝色），以及由Pop II恒星组成的第二次星暴阶段（红色）。

title: How well does MAGPHYS recover galaxy properties? A test using EAGLE simulated star-forming galaxies
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures; Accepted for publication in Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
summary: Spectral energy distribution (SED) models are widely used to infer the physical properties of galaxies from multi-wavelength photometry, but their accuracy is difficult to assess because the true properties of observed galaxies are generally unknown. We address this by fitting synthetic SEDs of ~31,000 star-forming galaxies drawn from the EAGLE cosmological simulations, post-processed with the SKIRT radiative transfer code, using the MAGPHYS SED modelling framework. This provides a controlled testbed with known intrinsic parameters, enabling a direct assessment of model accuracy and the origin of systematic biases. Under idealised conditions, fitting well-sampled ultraviolet-to-submillimetre SEDs at z=0.1, z=2, and z=5, MAGPHYS recovers stellar mass, star formation rate, specific star formation rate, dust mass, and dust luminosity to within <~0.14 dex, while mass-weighted stellar ages are not robustly constrained. We find that mismatches between the assumed star formation history (SFH) priors and the intrinsic SFHs of the simulated galaxies introduce systematic biases in stellar mass estimates, even when the fits provide good statistical agreement. To assess performance under realistic survey conditions, we construct a WAVES-like mock sample using optical and near-infrared photometry with realistic uncertainties. In this case, stellar masses and star formation rates remain well constrained (systematic offsets <~0.1 dex; scatters ~0.07 and ~0.15 dex, respectively), whereas dust properties degrade significantly without far-infrared data: dust luminosities show offsets of ~0.30 dex and scatters ~0.25 dex, and dust masses exhibit scatters ~0.3 dex. We conclude that MAGPHYS is a reliable tool for recovering key galaxy properties from broad-band photometry, but that SFH assumptions and limited wavelength coverage introduce significant uncertainties, particularly for dust and stellar ages.

AI.tldr: 通过使用EAGLE模拟星系作为测试平台，评估MAGPHYS SED建模框架在恢复星系物理特性方面的准确性，发现其在理想条件下表现良好，但在实际观测条件下对尘埃特性和恒星年龄的约束有限。
AI.motivation: SED模型被广泛用于从多波段测光数据推断星系物理特性，但由于观测星系的真实特性通常未知，难以评估这些模型的准确性。本研究旨在通过使用已知内在参数的模拟星系来直接评估模型准确性并识别系统偏差的来源。
AI.method: 使用EAGLE宇宙学模拟中的约31,000个恒星形成星系，通过SKIRT辐射传输代码进行后处理生成合成SED，然后使用MAGPHYS SED建模框架进行拟合。在理想条件下（z=0.1、2、5处采样良好的紫外到亚毫米SED）和实际观测条件下（WAVES-like模拟样本，仅使用光学和近红外测光数据）分别测试模型性能。
AI.result: 在理想条件下，MAGPHYS能够将恒星质量、恒星形成率、特定恒星形成率、尘埃质量和尘埃光度恢复至约0.14 dex以内，但质量加权恒星年龄无法可靠约束。当SFH先验与模拟星系的固有SFH不匹配时，即使拟合提供良好的统计一致性，也会引入恒星质量估计的系统偏差。在实际观测条件下，恒星质量和恒星形成率仍能较好约束（系统偏移约0.1 dex；散射分别为0.07和0.15 dex），但尘埃特性显著恶化：尘埃光度偏移约0.30 dex、散射约0.25 dex，尘埃质量散射约0.3 dex。
AI.conclusion: MAGPHYS是从宽带测光数据恢复关键星系特性的可靠工具，但SFH假设和有限的波长覆盖会引入显著不确定性，特别是对于尘埃和恒星年龄。需要谨慎解释这些参数，并考虑观测数据限制对结果可靠性的影响。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 光谱能量分布（SED）模型被广泛用于从多波段测光数据推断星系的物理性质，但其准确性难以评估，因为观测星系的真实性质通常是未知的。我们通过拟合从EAGLE宇宙学模拟中提取的约31,000个恒星形成星系的合成SED（这些星系经过SKIRT辐射转移代码后处理），并使用MAGPHYS SED建模框架来解决这一问题。这提供了一个具有已知内在参数的可控测试平台，从而能够直接评估模型准确性以及系统偏差的来源。在理想条件下，拟合在红移z=0.1、z=2和z=5处采样良好的紫外至亚毫米SED时，MAGPHYS恢复恒星质量、恒星形成率、比恒星形成率、尘埃质量和尘埃光度的精度在<~0.14 dex以内，而质量加权恒星年龄则无法得到稳健约束。我们发现，假设的恒星形成历史（SFH）先验与模拟星系的固有SFH之间的不匹配会在恒星质量估计中引入系统偏差，即使拟合结果在统计上表现良好。为了评估在真实观测条件下的性能，我们构建了一个类似WAVES的模拟样本，使用具有实际不确定性的光学和近红外测光数据。在这种情况下，恒星质量和恒星形成率仍然得到良好约束（系统偏移<~0.1 dex；弥散分别约为0.07和0.15 dex），而尘埃性质在没有远红外数据时显著退化：尘埃光度显示出约0.30 dex的偏移和约0.25 dex的弥散，尘埃质量显示出约0.3 dex的弥散。我们得出结论，MAGPHYS是从宽带测光数据恢复关键星系性质的可靠工具，但SFH假设和有限的波长覆盖会引入显著的不确定性，特别是对于尘埃和恒星年龄。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：MAGPHYS是从宽带测光数据恢复关键星系特性的可靠工具，但SFH假设和有限的波长覆盖会引入显著不确定性，特别是对于尘埃和恒星年龄。需要谨慎解释这些参数，并考虑观测数据限制对结果可靠性的影响。

title: MEOW: The increase in the obscured AGN fraction in mid-infrared from 0 < z < 6 with JWST MIRI
comment: 16 pages (main text), 9 figures (+ 2 in the appendix), 3 tables (+ 1 in the appendix). Submitted to ApJ
summary: Obscured active galactic nuclei (AGN) are often invoked to explain the rapid emergence of young quasars at high redshift and are crucial for building a complete census of AGN activity and black hole growth. The advent of the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) extends the discovery space for obscured AGN into the mid-infrared (mid-IR) with unprecedented precision through reprocessed dust emission. In this work, we use deep JWST Mid-Infrared Instrument (MIRI) imaging from the MIRI Early Obscured AGN Wide Survey (MEOW), together with existing JWST Near Infrared Camera (NIRCam), spectroscopic, and Hubble Space Telescope imaging data, to identify a previously unrecognized population of obscured AGN out to z ~ 6. Using spectral energy distribution (SED) modeling of the MIRI-detected sources, we identify 883 AGN over an area of ~ 131 arcmin2 and construct the AGN bolometric luminosity function, including both obscured and unobscured sources, across five redshift bins. We find an excess in AGN abundance relative to UV-selected AGN luminosity functions, indicating a substantial obscured population missed by optical/UV surveys, with the inferred obscured fraction increasing with redshift and reaching ~ 98-99% in our highest-redshift bin, 4.5 < z < 6. We also find higher AGN abundances and obscured fractions than X-ray-based studies, consistent with a previously unrecognized population of heavily obscured, Compton-thick AGN revealed by mid-IR selection. These results suggest that a large fraction of supermassive black hole growth at early times occurs during heavily obscured phases largely inaccessible at other wavelengths.

AI.tldr: JWST MIRI观测发现大量高红移(z~6)被尘埃遮蔽的活动星系核，这些AGN在光学/UV和X射线巡天中被严重低估，表明早期超大质量黑洞增长主要发生在高度遮蔽阶段。
AI.motivation: 研究被尘埃遮蔽的活动星系核对于理解高红移年轻类星体的快速形成、构建完整的AGN活动普查以及黑洞增长历史至关重要。JWST的MIRI仪器为通过中红外再处理尘埃发射探测遮蔽AGN提供了前所未有的能力。
AI.method: 使用JWST MIRI早期遮蔽AGN宽场巡天(MEOW)的深度成像数据，结合JWST NIRCam、光谱数据和哈勃空间望远镜成像，通过光谱能量分布(SED)建模识别MIRI探测源中的AGN，构建了包含遮蔽和非遮蔽源的AGN光度函数。
AI.result: 在~131平方角分区域内识别出883个AGN，发现相对于UV选择AGN光度函数存在显著过剩，表明光学/UV巡天遗漏了大量遮蔽AGN。遮蔽比例随红移增加，在最高红移区间(4.5<z<6)达到~98-99%。比X射线研究发现的AGN丰度和遮蔽比例更高，揭示了中红外选择发现的先前未被识别的高度遮蔽、康普顿厚AGN群体。
AI.conclusion: 早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞的增长大部分发生在高度遮蔽阶段，这些阶段在其他波段难以探测。中红外选择对于揭示完整的AGN群体和黑洞增长历史至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 遮蔽活动星系核（AGN）常被用来解释高红移年轻类星体的快速出现，并且对于构建完整的AGN活动和黑洞增长普查至关重要。詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）的出现，通过再处理的尘埃发射，以前所未有的精度将遮蔽AGN的发现空间扩展到了中红外。在这项工作中，我们利用来自MIRI早期遮蔽AGN宽视场巡天（MEOW）的深场JWST中红外仪器（MIRI）成像数据，结合现有的JWST近红外相机（NIRCam）、光谱和哈勃太空望远镜成像数据，识别出一个先前未被认识的、红移高达z~6的遮蔽AGN群体。通过对MIRI探测到的源进行光谱能量分布（SED）建模，我们在约131平方角分的区域内识别出883个AGN，并构建了跨越五个红移区间的AGN热光度函数，包括遮蔽和未遮蔽源。我们发现AGN丰度相对于紫外选择的AGN光度函数存在过剩，表明存在大量被光学/紫外巡天遗漏的遮蔽群体，且推断的遮蔽比例随红移增加，在我们最高红移区间（4.5 < z < 6）达到约98-99%。我们还发现AGN丰度和遮蔽比例高于基于X射线的研究，这与中红外选择揭示的先前未被认识的、大量遮蔽的康普顿厚AGN群体一致。这些结果表明，早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞的增长大部分发生在高度遮蔽阶段，这些阶段在其他波段难以探测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：早期宇宙中超大质量黑洞的增长大部分发生在高度遮蔽阶段，这些阶段在其他波段难以探测。中红外选择对于揭示完整的AGN群体和黑洞增长历史至关重要。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Framework for quantifying the AGN obscured fraction. We illustrate the layout in characterizing obscuration, from the MEOW source detections (§ II.3 ), followed by the identification of AGN, and corresponding bolometric luminosities and uncertainties \(L_{{bol}},\Delta L_{{bol}}\) (§ III.3 ), as well as photometric redshift determinations (§ II.5 ) through SED fitting. These measurements enable the construction of AGN luminosity functions across five redshift bins, incorporating both obscured and unobscured populations (§ IV ). Finally, we quantify the obscured fraction as a function of luminosity and redshift by evaluating the excess of MEOW AGN relative to type-1, unobscured quasars (§ V.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：量化AGN遮蔽比例的框架。我们展示了表征遮蔽的布局，从MEOW源探测（§ II.3）开始，随后是AGN的识别，以及相应的热光度和不确定性\(L_{{bol}},\Delta L_{{bol}}\)（§ III.3），以及通过SED拟合的光度红移测定（§ II.5）。这些测量使得能够构建跨越五个红移区间的AGN光度函数，包括遮蔽和未遮蔽群体（§ IV）。最后，我们通过评估MEOW AGN相对于1型未遮蔽类星体的过剩，量化了作为光度和红移函数的遮蔽比例（§ V.2）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: CIGALE redshift estimates compared to eazy (blue) and spectroscopic measurements (green). We show only the sources included in the analysis presented in this paper (§ IV ), namely those with \(f_{{AGN}}>0.1\) and \(L_{{bol}}>10^{44}\,{erg\,s^{-1}}\) . Overall, the CIGALE redshifts are in good agreement with both the eazy and spectroscopic measurements; however, we identify 41 outliers, as well as a bias toward lower redshift estimates from CIGALE (see text). Of the 254 sources, 83 have secure spectroscopic redshifts, which are adopted for the analysis in this paper. For the remaining 171, we rely on the CIGALE redshift estimates, noting that the choice between CIGALE and eazy does not affect the population-level results of this work (Appendix B ).

title: Euclid preparation. Cosmology Likelihood for Observables in Euclid (CLOE). 2. Code implementation
comment: Second in a series of six papers presenting CLOE, the Euclid likelihood code; 43 pages, 11 figures, accepted for publication in A&A (with a table of contents added)
summary: We provide a description of the code implementation and structure of Cosmology Likelihood for Observables in Euclid (CLOE), developed by members of the Euclid Consortium. CLOE is a modular Python code for computing the theoretical predictions of cosmological observables and evaluating them against state-of-the-art data from galaxy surveys such as Euclid in a unified likelihood. This primarily includes the core observables of weak gravitational lensing, photometric galaxy clustering, galaxy-galaxy lensing, and spectroscopic galaxy clustering, but also extended probes such as the clusters of galaxies and cross-correlations of galaxy positions and shapes with the cosmic microwave background. While CLOE has been developed to serve as the unified framework for the parameter inferences in Euclid, it has general capabilities that can serve the broader cosmological community. It is different from other comparable cosmological tools in that it is written entirely in Python, performs the full likelihood calculation, and includes both photometric and spectroscopic observables. We will focus on the primary probes of Euclid and will describe the overall code structure, rigorous code development practices, extensive documentation, unique features, speed optimization, and future development plans. CLOE is publicly available at https://github.com/cloe-org/cloe.

AI.tldr: CLOE是一个用于计算宇宙学可观测量理论预测并与星系巡天数据（如Euclid）进行统一似然评估的模块化Python代码框架。
AI.motivation: 为Euclid联盟的参数推断提供统一框架，同时为更广泛的宇宙学界提供通用能力，解决现有工具缺乏Python实现、完整似然计算以及同时包含光度和光谱观测量的不足。
AI.method: 开发模块化Python代码，包含弱引力透镜、光度星系成团、星系-星系透镜、光谱星系成团等核心可观测量，以及星系团、星系位置与形状与宇宙微波背景交叉相关等扩展探针。
AI.result: 创建了完全用Python编写的CLOE代码，具备完整似然计算能力，包含光度和光谱观测量，具有严格的代码开发实践、广泛文档、独特功能和速度优化。
AI.conclusion: CLOE作为Euclid参数推断的统一框架，同时服务于更广泛的宇宙学界，具有模块化设计、完整功能覆盖和公开可用性（GitHub开源），未来有持续开发计划。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提供了由欧几里得联盟成员开发的宇宙学可观测量似然函数（CLOE）的代码实现和结构描述。CLOE是一个模块化的Python代码，用于计算宇宙学可观测量的理论预测，并在统一的似然函数中将其与来自星系巡天（如欧几里得）的最新数据进行比较。这主要包括弱引力透镜、测光星系成团、星系-星系透镜和光谱星系成团等核心可观测量，也包括扩展探针，如星系团以及星系位置和形状与宇宙微波背景的互相关。虽然CLOE是为欧几里得参数推断的统一框架而开发的，但它具有通用能力，可以服务于更广泛的宇宙学界。它与其他类似的宇宙学工具不同之处在于，它完全用Python编写，执行完整的似然计算，并同时包含测光和光谱可观测量。我们将重点介绍欧几里得的主要探针，并描述整体代码结构、严格的代码开发实践、广泛的文档、独特功能、速度优化和未来开发计划。CLOE在https://github.com/cloe-org/cloe上公开可用。

title: Microlensing by Cluster of Primordial Black Holes
comment: 10 pages, 9 figures; Accepted to Astronomy Letters
summary: Numerous microlensing survey programs have constrained the possibility of dark matter existing in the form of compact objects within the Galactic halo. These constraints on the dark matter fraction were derived under the assumption of isolated, widely separated objects. This work investigates microlensing by primordial black holes (PBHs) organized into clusters. In this scenario, it is necessary to account for both the influence of neighboring PBHs and the collective gravitational potential of the entire cluster, which significantly complicates the microlensing light curve. Events exhibiting such complex light curves elude detection in observational experiments such as MACHO, EROS, OGLE, POINT-AGAPE, and HSC. It is demonstrated that a significant fraction of PBH dark matter (up to 93\% for the models studied) remains undetected in these observational data. However, for all considered cluster models, a substantial population of PBHs still behaves as isolated lenses. Consequently, the clustering of PBHs does not completely eliminate the microlensing constraints on the PBH contribution to dark matter.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了原始黑洞以团簇形式存在时的微引力透镜效应，发现传统孤立透镜假设会低估暗物质中原始黑洞的比例，团簇结构使高达93%的原始黑洞在现有观测数据中未被探测到。
AI.motivation: 传统微引力透镜观测假设暗物质以孤立、分散的致密天体形式存在，但原始黑洞可能以团簇形式组织，这种结构会显著改变微引力透镜的光变曲线，导致现有观测约束存在偏差。
AI.method: 研究分析了原始黑洞团簇中的微引力透镜效应，考虑了相邻原始黑洞的影响以及整个团簇的集体引力势，这种复杂引力环境会产生传统观测实验难以探测的复杂光变曲线。
AI.result: 研究发现原始黑洞团簇中高达93%的暗物质在MACHO、EROS、OGLE、POINT-AGAPE和HSC等观测数据中未被探测到，但仍有相当数量的原始黑洞表现为孤立透镜，因此团簇化并未完全消除微引力透镜对原始黑洞暗物质的约束。
AI.conclusion: 原始黑洞的团簇结构显著降低了现有微引力透镜观测对暗物质中原始黑洞比例的约束能力，但并未完全消除这些约束，未来观测需要考虑团簇效应以获得更准确的暗物质组成限制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 众多微引力透镜巡天项目已经限制了暗物质以银河系晕内致密天体形式存在的可能性。这些对暗物质占比的限制是在假设孤立、广泛分离的天体条件下得出的。本研究探讨了由原始黑洞（PBH）组成的团簇所产生的微引力透镜效应。在这种情景下，必须同时考虑邻近PBH的影响以及整个团簇的集体引力势，这显著复杂化了微引力透镜光变曲线。表现出这种复杂光变曲线的事件在诸如MACHO、EROS、OGLE、POINT-AGAPE和HSC等观测实验中难以被探测到。研究表明，在这些观测数据中，有相当一部分PBH暗物质（在所研究的模型中高达93%）未被探测到。然而，对于所有考虑的团簇模型，仍有大量PBH表现为孤立透镜。因此，PBH的团簇化并未完全消除微引力透镜对PBH暗物质贡献的限制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，原始黑洞的团簇结构显著降低了现有微引力透镜观测对暗物质中原始黑洞比例的约束能力，但并未完全消除这些约束，未来观测需要考虑团簇效应以获得更准确的暗物质组成限制。
